flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sullivan County Community College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.5k → $4.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Sullivan County Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (16.8% → 14.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Sullivan County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.5% → 0.0%).
